name: Zoho CRM
mcp_notes: Zoho provides an official Zoho CRM MCP server to enable AI agents to perform tasks.
access_notes: Zoho offers a fully featured free Developer Edition specifically for developers to learn, configure, and test their applications.
auth_notes: The v2 and later APIs use the OAuth 2.0 protocol for authentication.

evidence.claim: Zoho provides a fully featured free Developer Edition environment for developers.
Zoho CRM provides REST and GraphQL APIs for third-party integration.
All v2 APIs and later use OAuth 2.0 for authentication.
Search citation: Get Related Records | Zoho CRM API | V8

api_notes: The API is extensive, providing REST, GraphQL, Bulk, and Query APIs (COQL). It also includes comprehensive SDKs in multiple languages (Java, Python, PHP, Node.js, C#, Ruby, JavaScript).
one_liner: Zoho CRM is a customer relationship management platform that offers comprehensive developer tools, including REST and GraphQL APIs, to integrate and automate business processes.
